title: Bulk Chickpea and Vegetable Skillet Base
description: A simple, protein-rich chickpea and vegetable skillet designed for batch cooking and reuse in bowls, wraps, and salads.
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and bell peppers, cook until softened.
Add zucchini and garlic, cook for 3–5 minutes.
Add chickpeas and season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Serve over rice or keep components separate for flexibility.
Let cool and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat in microwave or skillet with a splash of water or oil to prevent drying.

batch_notes: Cook rice and chickpea mixture in parallel to save time.
Keep rice separate for more flexible meal variations.
meal_variations: Chickpea rice bowls with added sauce
